title: Porochna hoffmanni-ottonis

side_effects: Porochna hoffmanni-ottonis is a plant species that may pose risks to humans, but specific information about its side effects is limited. It's essential to exercise caution when handling unknown plant species. If ingested, Porochna hoffmanni-ottonis may cause gastrointestinal issues such as nausea, vomiting, or diarrhea. The plant's sap or other extracts might irritate skin, causing redness, itching, or allergic reactions. Further research is necessary to fully understand the potential risks associated with Porochna hoffmanni-ottonis.
